subcodes.first_line: The divine verses have encompassed the world, and the light of His grace hath illumined them that have recognized His unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیات الهی عالم را احاطه نموده و نور فضلش موحدین را منور داشته نیر عدل از افق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @reward and punishment, @power of love, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
